message:
fix(combinator): reset sliding window on HalfOpen→Closed circuit breaker transition

When the circuit breaker transitioned from HalfOpen to Closed via
successful probes in record_success(), the sliding window was not
reset. Stale failure entries from before the HalfOpen phase remained
in the window, and check_sliding_window_success() (called at line 670)
could immediately reopen the circuit — creating a HalfOpen→Closed→Open
oscillation within a single record_success() call.

Fix: add sliding_window.reset() inside the HalfOpen→Closed CAS success
block, matching the existing pattern in record_failure()'s Closed→Open
transitions (line 834-836).

Audit batch 406 — 7 files (~7,408L), 1 MEDIUM bug fixed:
- circuit_breaker.rs (1965L) FIXED
- fault.rs (1248L) SOUND
- debounce.rs (495L) SOUND
- interval.rs (1141L) SOUND
- load_shed.rs (905L) SOUND
- spawn_blocking.rs (580L) SOUND
- local_queue.rs (1074L) SOUND
